info.title: Ecommerce-buildTime
info.description: API for managing the Ecommerce-buildTime platform, providing endpoints for products, orders, customers, and payments.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Operations related to product management including creation, updating, retrieval, and deletion of products.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Endpoints for order processing, status tracking, and order history management.

tags.name: customers
tags.description: APIs for customer registration, account management, and profile updates.

tags.name: payments
tags.description: Handling payment processing, refunds, and transaction history.

get.summary: Retrieve the shopping cart for a specific user
get.description: Fetches the current shopping cart contents belonging to the user identified by the userId path parameter. Returns a cart object with items and corresponding details.

200.description: Successful response with the contents of the user's cart

example.message: The userId provided is invalid.

details.issue: Must be a valid non-empty string

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add an item to a user's shopping cart
post.description: Adds a specified item to the shopping cart of the user identified by userId. The request body must contain the details of the cart item to add. Returns the updated cart.

requestBody.description: The item to add to the user's cart

200.description: Item successfully added and updated cart returned

400.description: Invalid input data for adding an item to cart

example.message: The data supplied for the cart item is invalid or incomplete.

details.issue: Quantity must be a positive integer

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place a new order for the specified user
post.description: Creates a new order for the user identified by userId. No request body needed. Returns order confirmation and details upon success.

200.description: Order successfully placed and confirmation returned

example.message: The order placement request is invalid or missing required data.

details.issue: User not eligible to place order

example.message: The specified userId does not exist.

details.issue: No user matches the given identifier

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve details of a specific order
get.description: Fetches detailed information for the order identified by the orderId path parameter. Provides order status, items, pricing and shipment tracking if available.

200.description: Successful response with the order details

example.message: The orderId provided is invalid.

details.issue: Must be a valid, non-empty string

example.message: No order matches the provided orderId.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Begins the payment process with the provided payment details in the request body. Returns a payment response with transaction status and confirmation.

example.message: The payment initiation data is incomplete or invalid.
Payment was declined by the payment gateway.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Receives webhook notifications from payment gateways to update payment status in the system. The request body contains details of the payment event. Returns confirmation of processing.

requestBody.description: Payment webhook payload representing payment event details

400.description: Invalid webhook payload or missing required fields

example.message: The payment webhook payload is invalid or incomplete.

402.description: Payment required or payment failed related error

example.message: The payment was declined or failed processing.

500.description: Internal server error while processing webhook

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add a new product to the catalog
post.description: Creates a new product in the product catalog with all necessary details like name, description, price, and stock. Returns the created product details.

requestBody.description: Product details to add a new product to the catalog

example.name: Wireless Headphones
example.description: Noise-cancelling over-ear headphones with 20 hours battery life

example.message: Some product fields are invalid or missing.

details.issue: Price must be a positive number

409.description: Product with the given name already exists

example.message: A product with this name already exists in the catalog.

500.description: Internal server error while adding product

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve tracking information for a specific order
get.description: Fetches detailed shipping tracking information for the order identified by orderId. Includes current status, estimated delivery, and shipment history.

404.description: Order not found or tracking data unavailable

example.message: No shipment found for the specified order ID.

details.issue: Order ID does not exist or no shipping info

500.description: Server error while retrieving tracking information

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Creates a new user account with provided registration details such as username, email, and password. Returns created user information upon success.

example.message: User registration data failed validation.

409.description: User with provided email or username already exists

example.message: A user with this email or username already exists.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

currency.description: The currency code for the item price, e.g., USD, EUR.

discount.description: Discount amount applied to this item.

finalPrice.description: The final price of the item after discount.

price.description: Original price of the item before discount.

quantity.description: Quantity of the product in the cart.

currency.description: The overall currency used in the cart.

items.description: List of items in the shopping cart.

totalAmount.description: Total amount before applying any discounts.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied to the cart.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of when the cart was last updated.

userId.description: Identifier of the user who owns the cart.

discount.description: Discount amount applied to the order item.

finalPrice.description: Final price of the item after discount.

price.description: Original price of the item before discount.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created.

items.description: List of items included in the order.

paymentStatus.description: Current payment status of the order.

status.description: Current status of the order (e.g., Processing, Shipped).

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied to the order.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the order.

userId.description: Identifier of the user who placed the order.

amount.description: The total amount to be charged in the specified currency.

currency.description: The currency code in ISO 4217 format.

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the order associated with this payment.

paymentGateway.description: The payment gateway through which the payment will be processed.

paymentMethod.description: The method of payment chosen by the customer.

amount.description: The amount that was processed in the payment.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the payment was created.

currency.description: Currency in which the payment was made, ISO 4217 code.

orderId.description: Identifier of the order linked to this payment.

paymentId.description: Unique identifier assigned to this payment transaction.

paymentMethod.description: Payment method used for this transaction.

status.description: Current status of the payment transaction.

transactionId.description: Processor’s transaction identifier for reconciliation or tracking.

gatewayResponse.description: Raw response or message returned by the payment gateway.

paymentId.description: The payment identifier related to this webhook notification.

status.description: The current status of the payment as reported in the webhook.

transactionId.description: Unique transaction identifier from the payment gateway.

available.description: Indicates if the product is currently available for sale.

brand.description: The brand or manufacturer of the product.

category.description: Category under which the product is classified.

currency.description: Currency code for the product price, ISO 4217 format.

description.example: A high-quality wireless headset with noise cancellation.

rating.description: Average customer rating of the product from 0 to 5.

stock.description: Number of items available in stock.

available.description: Indicates if the product is currently available for purchase.

brand.description: The brand name of the product.

category.description: The category to which the product belongs.

createdAt.description: The ISO 8601 date and time when the product was created.

currency.description: The currency code for the product price.

description.description: A detailed description of the product.

price.description: The price of the product including taxes.

productId.description: The unique identifier for the product.

rating.description: Average customer rating of the product, between 0 and 5.

stock.description: The current stock quantity available for the product.

updatedAt.description: The ISO 8601 date and time when the product was last updated.

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier partner handling the shipment.

estimatedDelivery.description: The estimated delivery date in ISO 8601 format.

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp of the last update to the tracking information.

orderId.description: Unique identifier of the order being tracked.

trackingId.description: Unique identifier for the tracking record.

active.description: Indicates whether the user account is active.

phone.description: Contact phone number of the user.

active.description: Indicates if the user is currently active.

country.description: Country of residence of the user.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the user account was created.

preferredCurrency.description: Preferred currency code of the user.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last update to the user profile.

userType.description: The role or type of user.

error.description: Summary of the client error type

message.description: Detailed message explaining the client error

status.description: HTTP status code representing the client error

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the error occurred in ISO 8601 format

path.description: Request path that resulted in the error

details.description: List of detailed error information about each invalid field

field.description: Name of the field with the validation issue

issue.description: Description of what is wrong with the field

error.description: Summary of the server error type

message.description: Detailed message explaining the server error

status.description: HTTP status code representing the server error

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the error occurred in ISO 8601 format
